notes: BUG-001 fix APPROVED. Full column-by-column audit passed (16/16 columns match between Drizzle schema and init.sql). ENUMs (cluster_provider, cluster_environment, cluster_health_status) correctly placed at lines 76-90, BEFORE CREATE TABLE clusters at line 93. All defaults correct: connection_config DEFAULT '{}', health_status DEFAULT 'unknown', is_active DEFAULT TRUE, provider DEFAULT 'kubeconfig', status DEFAULT 'unreachable'. provider column is correctly typed as cluster_provider enum (not VARCHAR). Architecture compliance: server.ts has ZERO migrate() calls (only comments), values.yaml has migrate.enabled:false. The old approach (3 ENUMs defined AFTER the table + 5 ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN statements) was correctly replaced with a clean inline CREATE TABLE that includes all 16 columns from the start. A fresh Helm uninstall+install will produce a fully working clusters page with all required columns present from day 1. Migration 0002 (environment, connection_config, health_status, last_health_check), 0011 (credential_ref, is_active, last_connected_at) columns all inlined. Anomaly tables also correctly added at the end with proper FK constraints.
